entries.round: task:The 'tasks.md' file is out of sync. Many items from Phase 1, Phase 2, and Phase 3 WERE ACTually completed earlier (like the Home page, Category pages, Article details, Price page, sitemap, next-intl, HreflangTags, etc.) when the frontend was first built, but the checkboxes got wiped out when the architecture was changed. 1. Read 'src/' carefully to see what actually exists. 2. Update 'tasks.md' to accurately reflect the true state of the codebase. Check off all the completed frontend tasks. Use <write_file> tags.
